panels.description: Traffic volume broken down by HTTP status class. A growing error band signals degradation.
panels.title: Request Rate by Status Class

panels.description: Traffic volume broken down by endpoint and HTTP status code.
panels.title: Request Rate by Endpoint & Status Code (Top 15)

panels.description: Busiest endpoints by request volume. Use this to identify traffic hotspots and plan capacity.
panels.title: Request Rate by Endpoint (Top 10)

panels.description: Requests exceeding the slow threshold (default 1s). Spikes here mean endpoints are degrading before full timeouts.
panels.title: Slow Requests by Endpoint (>1s)

panels.description: Currently in-flight requests per endpoint. High values signal saturation or stuck requests.
panels.title: In-Flight Requests by Endpoint

panels.description: Which endpoints are failing the most? First question during any incident.
panels.title: Error Rate by Endpoint (Top 10)

panels.description: Error breakdown by endpoint and status code. See exactly which 4xx/5xx codes are firing.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (handler, status) (rate(http_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", status=~"5..", handler=~"$handler"}[$__rate_interval])) > 0)

panels.title: Error Rate by Endpoint & Status Code (Top 10)

panels.description: Error rate normalized by traffic. 3 errors/s at 1000 rps is fine; at 5 rps it's catastrophic.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (handler) (rate(http_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", status=~"5..", handler=~"$handler"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (handler) (rate(http_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", handler=~"$handler"}[$__rate_interval])) > 0)

panels.title: Error Percentage by Endpoint (Top 10)

panels.description: P50-to-P99 divergence signals tail latency or partial failures.
panels.title: Latency Percentiles Over Time

panels.description: Which endpoints are slowest? P95 catches tail latency without the noise of P99.
panels.title: P95 Latency by Endpoint (Top 10)

panels.description: Full latency distribution. Reveals bimodal patterns and gradual degradation that percentile lines mask.
panels.title: Latency Heatmap

panels.description: Sortable summary of every endpoint. Click a column header to rank by that metric.

targets.expr: sum by (handler) (rate(http_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", status=~"5..", handler=~"$handler"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (handler) (rate(http_requests_total{instance=~"$instance", handler=~"$handler"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: All Endpoints — P50 / P95 / P99 / Throughput / Error Rate
DB Pool Utilization (checked out / size / overflow)
DB Connection Hold Time p95 by Endpoint (Top 10)
